Compliance.description: CMS reg 1252; GCR AA (very strong); regulated under Medical Schemes Act; no major complaints/violations found 2025/26.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.57/5 (Trust 2.6/10, 1161 reviews); Google 2.1/5 (480 reviews); mixed feedback, awards contradict.

Product Value.description: Competitive 2026 pricing (6.8% increase); 14 plans hospital-to-comprehensive; strong day-to-day/savings; enhanced 2026 limits.

Innovation.description: Tempo wellness (free screenings/consults/emotional support, no points); 2026 adds colon/HIV/PSA screens; app claims/portals; disease mgmt programs.

Customer Support.description: 0860 002378 toll-free, email service@bestmed.co.za, app queries, ChatNow, Mon-Fri 8-5/Sat 8-1; complaints via internal/CMS.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website references POPIA/Data Protection Policy; app collects identifiers/diagnostics (not linked); standard healthcare security assumed. No breaches reported.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From R1736/mo (Rhythm1 income-based principal) to R12572/mo (Pace4)

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter/Google low ratings (service/claims complaints); internal awards (SA-csi top, Titanium); news positive on 2026 updates.
